info.title: Tumbas POS API
info.description: Minimal point of sale API for products, checkout, sales history, and sales summary.

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Stock movements, receiving, adjustment, and opname

tags.name: Activity Logs
tags.description: System and user activity audit logs

tags.name: Purchase Receiving
tags.description: Stock receiving and purchase invoice tracking

tags.name: Opname
tags.description: Physical inventory counting and stock opname

tags.name: Cash Drawer
tags.description: Cash drawer shift opening, cash movements, closing, and audit trail

post.description: Authenticates a user with username and password, returns a Sanctum access token.
Revokes the personal access token being used to authenticate the current request.

get.description: Returns details of the currently logged-in user, including their assigned roles and permissions.
Retrieves a paginated list of users. Access is restricted to users with 'view_users' or 'manage_users' permission.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for name, username, or email.

post.description: Registers a new user and assigns them roles. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information for a user. Access is restricted to users with 'view_users' or 'manage_users' permission.

put.description: Updates an existing user. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

delete.description: Deactivates a user. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

get.description: Retrieves all roles with their assigned permissions. Access is restricted to admin.

message.example: Daftar role dan permission berhasil dimuat.

get.description: Retrieves all available permissions in the system. Access is restricted to admin.

post.description: Assigns one or more permissions to a role. Resolves role by ID or Name. Access is restricted to admin.

delete.description: Revokes a permission from a role. Resolves role and permission by ID or Name. Access is restricted to admin.

400.description: Bad Request - Role does not have the specified permission.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of stock movements. Access is restricted to users with 'view_inventory' permission.
Retrieves movements for a specific product. Access is restricted to users with 'view_inventory' permission.

post.description: Manually adjusts the stock of a product (damage, loss, etc.). Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

get.description: Retrieves list of opnames. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

post.description: Records a new draft stock opname. Does not modify actual product stock. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

delete.description: Deletes a draft stock opname sheet. Completed opname cannot be deleted. Restricted to manage_inventory permission.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search keyword for product name or brand.

parameters.name: low_stock
parameters.description: When true, return products with stock less than or equal to 5.

get.description: List all products. Access is restricted to users with 'view_products' or 'manage_products' permission.

post.description: Create a new product. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_products' permission.

get.description: Get product details. Access is restricted to users with 'view_products' or 'manage_products' permission.

put.description: Update product details. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_products' permission.

delete.description: Delete product. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_products' permission.

get.summary: Search products by barcode or name
get.description: Search products by barcode (exact or partial) or name (case-insensitive partial match). Returns up to 10 matching products. Cashiers are restricted to active products only.

parameters.name: barcode
parameters.description: Barcode or name query to search for.

patch.description: Change product status. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_products' permission.

get.description: Returns the authenticated cashier's open cash drawer session, or null when no drawer is open.

post.description: Starts a new open cash drawer session for the authenticated cashier. A cashier can only have one open session.

get.description: Retrieves cash drawer sessions. Restricted to users with view_cash_drawer permission.
Returns a cash drawer session with movements and transactions. Cashiers can view their own sessions; supervisors and managers can view all sessions.

post.description: Adds cash to an open drawer and updates expected cash.
Removes cash from an open drawer and updates expected cash.
Closes an open drawer by comparing expected cash with the counted closing balance.
Creates a sale, stores item snapshots, validates stock, and decreases product stock.

get.description: Retrieve daily sales metrics. Restricted to view_reports permission.
Retrieves system and user activity audit logs. Access is restricted to users with 'view_audit_logs' permission.
Get all suppliers without pagination. Access is restricted to users with 'view_suppliers' or 'manage_suppliers' permission.
Get a paginated list of suppliers. Access is restricted to users with 'view_suppliers' or 'manage_suppliers' permission.

post.description: Register a new supplier master data. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_suppliers' permission.

get.description: Get details for a specific supplier. Access is restricted to users with 'view_suppliers' or 'manage_suppliers' permission.

put.description: Update an existing supplier. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_suppliers' permission.

delete.description: Delete an existing supplier. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_suppliers' permission.

get.description: Retrieves list of categories.

get.summary: Print standard grid of barcodes for a single product
Print grid of barcodes for multiple products in bulk

post.summary: Print grid of barcodes for multiple products in bulk

get.summary: List all product price changes audit logs
get.description: Retrieves audit logs of all product price modifications. Access is restricted to users with 'view_products' or 'manage_products' permission.

get.summary: List price changes audit logs for a product
get.description: Retrieves price modification logs for a specific product. Access is restricted to users with 'view_products' or 'manage_products' permission.
Retrieves list of purchase orders. Access is restricted to view_purchase permission.

post.description: Creates a new draft purchase order. Access restricted to manage_purchase permission.

422.description: Validation error (PO not in draft status).

put.summary: Update items of draft purchase order
Update draft stock receiving (header only) (flat prefix)
Update items of draft stock receiving

patch.summary: Update receiving payment status manually (flat prefix)

post.summary: Finalize return (deducts stock and posts to ledger)

get.description: Lists purchase orders in 'ordered' or 'partially_received' status.

get.summary: List receivings linked to purchase order

422.description: Validation error (no items, or already completed).

post.summary: Scan product barcode for receiving note

200.description: Product details and PO statistics retrieved.
List of completed receiving notes with unpaid/partial status.

get.summary: Get payment summary details of receiving note

parameters.name: receiving_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Stock Receiving note.

200.description: Total invoice, paid amount, remaining debt, and payments log.

get.summary: Get list of returnable items for a receiving note

200.description: List of received items with their remaining returnable quantities.

post.summary: Scan product barcode for return item validation

200.description: Product details and maximum returnable quantity.

422.description: Product not registered in receiving note.

BearerAuth.description: Enter the Sanctum plainTextToken retrieved from login.
